settle.req.title: Fees / Settlement - Settlement Request
settle.req.cardTitle: Send a settlement request to HQ?
settle.req.cardDesc: This settlement includes only confirmed transactions from the day after the last settlement date up to yesterday. Same-day transactions, refunds, problem transactions, Sync failures, and risk transactions are excluded and held. After HQ approval, sub-partners are also settled automatically.
settle.req.toast: Settlement request sent to HQ. After approval, sub-partner settlements are processed automatically.
settle.req.calc.title: Settleable Amount Calculation
settle.req.calc.desc: Sums partner fee profit and direct merchant profit, then subtracts the held/excluded amount to derive the request amount.
settle.req.fee.title: Fee Structure
settle.req.auto.title: Auto-Settlement After HQ Request
settle.req.pt.title: Partner Fee Profit
settle.req.pt.desc: Per sub-partner: amount, total fee, leader fee, partner fee, and held amount.
settle.req.pt.name: Partner
settle.req.dt.title: Direct Merchant Fee Profit
settle.req.dt.desc: Fees for merchants the leader directly contracts and manages. No partner fee applies.
settle.req.dt.name: Merchant
settle.req.ht.title: Held / Excluded Transactions
settle.req.ht.desc: Refunds, problem transactions, risk transactions, Sync failures, and flagged-account transactions are excluded.
settle.req.final.title: Request Settlement to HQ
settle.req.final.desc: Requests settlement to HQ based on the final settleable amount. After HQ approval, leader and sub-partner fees are settled automatically.

auth.portalDesc: Admin portal where leaders, partners, and merchants access the KORION PAY operations system.
auth.main.title: Login / Sign Up Main
auth.card.partnerSignupDesc: Sign up with a leader code or HQ contract
auth.card.merchantSignupDesc: Sign up with a leader code, partner code, or HQ contract
auth.notice.1: • Leader accounts are issued after HQ approval.
auth.notice.2: • Partners and merchants are activated after HQ or upper-org review post sign-up.
auth.notice.3: • Accessible menus and data scope are restricted by account permission.
auth.login.subtitle.hq: Access the HQ operations dashboard and approval/settlement management screens.
auth.login.subtitle.leader: Access the country leader admin page.
auth.login.subtitle.partner: Access the sales partner admin page.
auth.login.subtitle.merchant: Check merchant payments, settlement, and store info.
auth.access.title: Permission-Based Access Guide
auth.access.desc: Data scope and menus are auto-restricted by account role.
auth.access.footer: Leaders see only their country, partners only their onboarded merchants, merchants only their own store data.
auth.signup.subtitle.partner: Enter your basic and affiliation info to operate as a sales partner.
auth.signup.subtitle.merchant: Enter the merchant info that will receive KORION PAY payments.
auth.signup.modeDesc.leaderPartner: Sign up via an assigned country leader's referral or org code. After verification, leader name, country, city, and org status are shown.
auth.signup.modeDesc.code: Shows code verification success/failure and an upper-affiliation confirmation card.
auth.signup.modeDesc.hq: Proceed via HQ review without an upper leader. An 'HQ review required' badge is shown.
auth.signup.hqReviewReasonRequiredAlert: When selecting HQ review, you must enter the contract reason.
auth.signup.requestFailed: An error occurred while processing the request.
auth.signup.placeholder.password: 8+ chars with letters, numbers, and symbols
auth.signup.placeholder.hqReason: Required when selecting direct HQ contract
auth.signup.placeholder.wallet: Supported KORION WALLET network address (TRX, BTC, ERC, etc.)
auth.signup.hint.evidence: Store image / logo URL or document link (recommended 256 x 256, up to 3MB)
auth.signup.password.mismatch: Passwords do not match. Please check again.
auth.signup.password.requireNumberSpecia: Use at least 8 characters and include a number and a special character.
auth.signup.validation.title: Application check
auth.signup.validation.requiredBasics: ID, password, email, and name/store name are required.
auth.signup.validation.loginIdCheckRequi: Please complete the ID duplicate check.
auth.signup.validation.loginIdInvalid: Use letters and numbers only, within 20 characters.
auth.signup.validation.twitterInvalid: Use only letters, numbers, and underscores for your X / Twitter ID.
auth.signup.validation.contactNameRequir: Enter the contact or owner name.
auth.signup.validation.countryInvalid: Enter a 2-letter ISO country code. Example: KR, NG
auth.signup.validation.hqReasonRequired: Enter the direct HQ contract reason.
auth.signup.validation.storeAddressIndus: Enter the merchant address and industry.
auth.signup.validation.agreementsRequire: Please check all required agreement items.
auth.signup.f.name: Partner Name *
auth.signup.wallet.invalidAlert: The wallet address does not match. Please check it again.
auth.signup.wallet.duplicateAlert: This wallet address is already verified or used by an open signup application.
auth.signup.wallet.notificationFailedAle: Could not send the verification code to the KORION Wallet app notification inbox. Please try again later.
auth.signup.wallet.requestFailedAlert: An error occurred while requesting KORION Wallet address verification. Please try again later.
auth.signup.wallet.sent: A verification code has been sent to the KORION Wallet app notifications.
auth.signup.wallet.invalidCodeAlert: The Wallet verification code is invalid or expired.
auth.signup.email.invalid: Enter a valid email address. Example: example@email.com
auth.signup.email.codeRequired: Enter your email and verification code.
auth.signup.email.sent: A verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.signup.email.invalidCodeAlert: The verification code is incorrect. Please check it again or resend the code.
auth.signup.email.deliveryNotConfigured: Email delivery is not configured yet. Please contact the administrator.
auth.signup.email.deliveryFailed: Failed to send the email. Please try again later.
auth.signup.referral.invalid: This code is not registered in DB or is inactive.
auth.signup.referral.apiError: An error occurred while checking the code.
auth.signup.availability.loginIdDuplicat: This ID is already in use.
auth.signup.availability.telegramDuplica: This ID is already in use.
auth.signup.availability.telegramRequire: Complete the Telegram ID duplicate check.
auth.signup.availability.phoneDuplicate: This number is already in use.
auth.signup.availability.phoneRequired: Complete the Phone / WhatsApp duplicate check.
auth.signup.availability.duplicate: This value is already in use.
auth.signup.agree.1: [Required] I confirm the information is true and agree that false info may lead to rejection, restriction, or settlement hold.
auth.signup.agree.2: [Required] I agree to KORION PAY partner operation policy, fee terms, settlement conditions, and HQ review process.
auth.signup.agree.3: [Required] I acknowledge the application may be approved, held, info-requested, or rejected after HQ or upper-leader review.
auth.signup.agree.4: [Required] I agree my info may be used for partner screening, dup check, wallet linking, settlement, and risk management.
auth.signup.agree.5: [Required] I confirm KORION PAY Admin never requests private keys, seed phrases, or PINs, and wallet linking is address-verify + app-approval only.
auth.signup.agree.6: [Required] I agree to receive partner operation notices, updates, training materials, and event info.
auth.signup.submitFailed: An error occurred while submitting the application.
auth.signup.modal.title: Submit your application?
auth.signup.modal.desc: After submission, your account is activated following HQ or upper-org review.
auth.signup.toast: Application submitted. (Click to go to the login screen)
minfo.title: Merchant Info
minfo.desc: Sales partners register sub-merchants and request leader approval. Final approve/hold/reject/info-request is handled by the leader after review.
minfo.codeDesc: The partner code is auto-generated as country code + SP + sequence, finalized upon HQ approval.
minfo.req.memoPlaceholder: Enter why you recommend this partner and the expected impact.
minfo.check.1: [Required] I confirmed the store name, owner, contact, email, Telegram ID, and WhatsApp are reachable.
minfo.check.2: [Required] I confirmed the merchant's country, city, and address are within my or my leader's coverage area.
minfo.check.3: [Required] I confirmed the merchant is a real store providing goods or services.
minfo.check.4: [Required] I confirmed the industry is not restricted, illegal, or high-risk under KORION PAY policy.
minfo.check.5: [Required] I confirmed the merchant understands QR/NFC/Bluetooth/Offline Payment use and intends to adopt KORION PAY.
minfo.check.6: [Required] I confirmed the merchant's KORION Wallet / settlement address is submitted with no duplicate or suspicious info.
minfo.check.7: [Required] I confirmed the name, contact, Telegram ID, WhatsApp, and Wallet address are not duplicates of existing records.
minfo.check.8: [Required] I confirmed this is not a fake/test store, identity theft, duplicate, or fee-fraud application.
minfo.check.9: [Required] I confirmed the merchant understands responsibility for refunds, settlement, disputes, and goods delivery.
minfo.check.10: [Required] I informed the merchant the application may be approved, held, info-requested, or rejected after review.
minfo.check.11: [Required] As a sales partner, I performed a first review of the above info and request leader approval.
minfo.finalCheck: I reviewed the above merchant's basic info, contact, store info, Wallet address, duplication, industry, and risk, and request leader approval review.

hqDashboard.aiInsight.desc: Quickly spot risk, Sync, settlement, and growth anomalies with AI-based operational insights.
hqDashboard.aiInsight.msg1: Offline payment Sync failure rate in Nigeria is above average.
hqDashboard.aiInsight.msg2: A partner has many registered merchants but a low actual payment rate.
hqDashboard.aiInsight.msg3: Repeated settlement request failures were detected across 3 wallets.
hqDashboard.aiInsight.msg4: New merchant growth this week is up 22% from the previous week.
hqDashboard.aiInsight.msg5: BLE payment failure rate is higher than QR — a device compatibility check is needed.
hqDashboard.aiInsight.msg6: 4 of the settlement-hold targets are linked to the same device ID.
